prompt:
Take the FIRST provided reference image (currently approved step 21 — dual-state illustration of placing the blood-filled vial into the white protector tube body, then placing the black DIALED cap on top) and reproduce it PIXEL-FAITHFULLY in EVERY element — same dual-state composition (LEFT: hand lowering blood-filled vial into white protector tube body; ARROW; RIGHT: hand placing black cap onto assembled tube), same hand poses, same vial appearance (transparent tube + red blood + plain ribbed cap), same tube proportions, same arrow, same line-art style on pure white background, same uniform medium-weight black ink line work, same outlined line-art letter treatment.

>>> MANDATORY TEXT FIX <<< — same fix that was just applied to step 17. The text on the protector tube must read 'DIALED HEALTH' linearly top-down on the assembled upright tube, with each word's FIRST LETTER sitting at the TOP of its section. Currently the letter sequences run REVERSED so reading top-down spells the words backwards.

REQUIRED FINAL TEXT STATE:

  • BLACK CAP (top section, held by the hand in the RIGHT state of the dual composition): the word 'DIALED' rendered as a vertical column of 6 RIGHT-SIDE-UP outlined capital letters stacked along the cap's axis. Reading from the TOP of the cap DOWN, the letters appear in this exact sequence: D (topmost) → I → A → L → E → D (bottommost, just above the cap/body seam). Each letter upright, NOT upside-down, NOT mirrored. Reading top-down spells D-I-A-L-E-D = 'DIALED' forward. Thin WHITE outline strokes against the solid-black cap fill (line-art embossed look — letter interior remains black, NOT solid white blocks).

  • WHITE BODY (bottom section, present in BOTH the LEFT and RIGHT states): the word 'HEALTH' rendered as a vertical column of 6 RIGHT-SIDE-UP outlined capital letters stacked along the body's axis. Reading from the TOP of the body DOWN, the letters appear in this exact sequence: H (topmost, just below the cap/body seam in the assembled RIGHT state, or just below the body's open mouth in the LEFT state) → E → A → L → T → H (bottommost, near the body's base). Each letter upright. Reading top-down spells H-E-A-L-T-H = 'HEALTH' forward. Thin BLACK outline strokes against the white body fill (line-art embossed look — letter interior remains white, NOT solid black blocks).

  • Combined top-to-bottom reading of the upright assembled tube (right state): BLACK CAP showing DIALED forward (D-I-A-L-E-D) → WHITE BODY showing HEALTH forward (H-E-A-L-T-H) = 'DIALED HEALTH' linearly top-down, correctly spelled forward on both sections.

  • Both states' BODY shows HEALTH in this same correct top-down forward orientation. The cap text (DIALED, in the RIGHT state only) is in this same correct top-down forward orientation.

The required change vs the reference is the letter sequence/orientation of BOTH words: every letter that was upside-down becomes right-side-up, and the letter sequence that was reading 'HTLAEH' top-down on the body now reads 'HEALTH' top-down (likewise 'DELAID' → 'DIALED' on the cap).

Do NOT modify anything else — same dual-state composition, same hands, same vial appearance, same blood, same ribbed vial cap, same tube proportions, same arrow, same line weight, same white background, same line-art aesthetic. The ONLY change is the letter order/orientation on both words on the protector tube so they read DIALED and HEALTH forward top-down with the first letter of each word at the top of its section.

No frame, no border, no other labels, no numbers.
